actionUnits.condition: Manually reload the current scene via LoadScene (MonoBehaviour_1, id=1907113017, guid=403efda511d335c4a865b0a1f33cc9e0) to ensure OnSceneLoad.OnLoad (MonoBehaviour_0, id=1907113015, guid=e9315cd1bd0bb624886da5b1f92c045e) UnityEvent is invoked. The OnLoad UnityEvent has persistent calls (m_Calls) to TeleportPlayer.Teleport (target fileID=692630298) and FadeCanvas.StartFadeOut (target fileID=263574720), which should execute upon sceneLoaded. This validates OnSceneLoad.Awake subscription, PlayEvent invocation, and UnityEvent wiring.
